examples: He succeeded by dint of hard work.
He succeeds by dint of sheer hard work.
The globe on fire, the earth in blood and forgotten my peaceful evening by dint of itching, fighting, hunting, scanning the ceiling and the starry sky!
World output inched up to 86 million bpd a year ago only by dint of spigot-opening by OPEC.
Cantor has a large piece of digital-era trading, too, by dint of controlling publicly traded eSpeed.
